facts: Kylian Mbappé is in full physical and psychological form for the World Cup preparation.
Key PSG players (Ousmane Dembélé, Désiré Doué, Bradley Barcola, Warren Zaïre-Emery) are expected to be rested for the friendly match against Ivory Coast.
William Saliba is experiencing recurrent absences due to injury and played only three out of eight national team matches this season.
The central defense pairing of Ibrahima Konaté and Dayot Upamecano has been effective, remaining undefeated in nine matches when starting together.
The team shows a relaxed and competitive atmosphere during training sessions.
Dario Naamo is absent from the squad.
Jussef Nasrawe is absent from the squad.
Peter Gwargis, who scored 19 goals this season in the Iraqi Championship, is not included in the squad.
Montader Madjed, a key player at Hammarby, is not included in the squad.
The team considers the friendly match against Spain a crucial test for their World Cup group stage preparation.
Lamine Yamal, injured since late April, is expected to be ready for the first World Cup match on June 15.
Lamine Yamal and Nico Williams were absent from recent training sessions due to injury recovery.
Key players, including Lamine Yamal, Nico Williams, Ruiz, Merino, Zubimendi, and Raya, will be rested for the friendly match against Iraq.
